scope.summary: Dedicated embedding model distinct from the chat model: a second local-model registration whose ModelCapabilities declares supports_embedding + embedding dimension, so LoomSearchV2 embeds via the embedding-capable model resolved from the shared registry rather than via the single chat model's profile().model_id.
scope.origin: Deferred from MT-014 AC-4b per the MT-014 pre-implementation adversarial review (task aa63db63808f7a7b3, finding F9): 'dedicated embedding model distinct from the chat model' is materially larger than MT-014's embedding-dimension degrade-not-error fix and is unsupported by the current single-model config + capability model. Split out so MT-014 does not scaffold it. MT-014 keeps the degrade-not-error robustness (AC-4a); MT-016 adds the real second embedding model.
forbidden_paths: heavy llama.cpp C++ subprocess build (opt-in only per WP architecture_directives)
acceptance_criteria: TO_BE_FINALIZED_AT_ACTIVATION. Draft intent: (1) ModelCapabilities gains an embedding capability (supports_embedding + embedding dimension) declared per spec 4.6.3; (2) a second local model may be configured + registered as embedding-capable (config surface beyond the single HANDSHAKE_LOCAL_MODEL_PATH); (3) LoomSearchV2 resolves the embedding-capable model from the shared registry (MT-014) instead of hard-coding profile().model_id; (4) when no dedicated embedding model is configured it degrades per MT-014 (degrade-not-error), not crash; (5) engine-free proof using InMemoryLlmClient embedding dims; (6) same-change UserManual coverage; pre/post adversarial review.
scope.risk_if_missed: LoomSearchV2 semantic search is permanently tied to the single chat model's embedding output; operators cannot run a separate, correctly-dimensioned embedding model, limiting semantic search quality and the CPU-baseline story.

implementation_notes: Do NOT start before MT-014 lands the shared/enumerable registry + degrade-not-error (this MT resolves the embedding model FROM that registry).
Confirm scope with operator before activation: whether a second local model config surface is in-scope now or a further follow-on.
Rust-only. CPU-baseline (Candle) default; llama.cpp opt-in only.

risks: A second-model config could be scaffolded without a real embedding model behind it.
The embedding capability could be declared but never consulted by LoomSearchV2 (fake wiring).
minimum_controls: Engine-free proof that LoomSearchV2 routes embeddings to the registry-resolved embedding-capable model.
Degrade-not-error retained when no dedicated embedding model is configured.

handshake_compatibility.spec_realism_gate: Implementer may move only to READY_FOR_VALIDATION after real engine-free proofs; COMPLETED is validator-only.
